description_long: This is a modern, boxy couch with a deep seat and wide, squared armrests, upholstered in a dark, textured fabric. The couch features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear loose and generously filled for comfort. The upholstery has a subtle woven pattern, giving the surface a matte, slightly textured appearance. The base and sides of the couch are solid and fully upholstered, with no visible legs, creating a grounded and monolithic look. The armrests are thick and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the couch's geometric silhouette. The overall design is minimalist and robust, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy couch with wide armrests and deep, loose cushions, upholstered in dark, textured fabric. The design is minimalist and solid, with no visible legs and a monolithic appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid, fully upholstered back and the tops of the two back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, squared armrest and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the two large seat cushions and two back cushions, as well as the wide armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the base appears fully upholstered and flush with the floor, giving a block-like appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, squared, and fully upholstered armrests at the same height as the backrest; straight and monolithic in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; backrest is continuous and unadorned.
